zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger l Merlay於大約1145年出生在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯時，他的父親Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth29歲，母親Juliana de Dunbar27歲。他和Alice Stuteville至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1188年在他的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger l Merlay于大约1145年出生在英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯时，他的父亲Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth29岁，母亲Juliana de Dunbar27岁。他和Alice Stuteville至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于大约1188年在他的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Merlay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician (Merlán): habitational name from any of the seven places called Merlán in Galicia (Spain), from the ancient Germanic personal name Merila.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger l Merlay was born about 1145, in Morpeth, Northumberland, England, his father, Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth, was 29 and his mother, Juliana de Dunbar, was 27. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Alice Stuteville. He died about 1188, in his hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger l Merlay est né environ 1145, à Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Dunbar, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Alice Stuteville. Il est décédé environ 1188, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger l Merlay um 1145 in Morpeth, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth 29 und seine Mutter Juliana de Dunbar 27. Er hatte mit Alice Stuteville mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1188 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger l Merlay è nato il circa 1145 nel Morpeth, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Juliana de Dunbar, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Alice Stuteville. Morì circa 1188, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

ja.Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberlan: イギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスニューミンスター アビー

ja.lifeSummary: Roger l Merlayが約1145年にイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスで生まれた時，父Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpethは29歳，母Juliana de Dunbarは27歳であった。彼はAlice Stutevilleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1188年に故郷で45歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスニューミンスター アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger l Merlay(이)가 대략 1145년 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana de Dunbar(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Alice Stuteville(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1188년 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스 뉴민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger l Merlay nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Dunbar, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Alice Stuteville. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1188, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger l Merlay родился около 1145 г. в местности морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Dunbar, 27. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Alice Stuteville. Он умер около 1188 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности нюминстир эбби, морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия.

sm.about 1145–about 1188: e tusa o le 1145–e tusa o le 1188

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger l Merlay nació aproximadamente 1145, en Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Juliana de Dunbar, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Alice Stuteville. Murió aproximadamente 1188, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
